dashboard.title: Executive Dashboard

dashboard.noDataDescription: Start processing payrolls and your dashboard metrics will appear here.
dashboard.description: Real-time overview of payroll verification and anti-fraud intelligence
dashboard.payrollTrendDescription: Monthly payroll volume, flagged anomalies, and verification pass rate

dashboard.liveInsightsDescription: Real-time AI anomaly detection and intelligence

dashboard.insight_1: Salary discrepancy detected in Q1 payroll for Employee #2841 — 32% above expected range
dashboard.insight_2: Duplicate bank account flagged across 3 payroll records — possible ghost employee
dashboard.insight_3: Tax withholding anomaly in department Engineering — $12,400 unaccounted
dashboard.insight_4: Employment contract metadata inconsistency — PDF creation date predates hire date by 6 months
dashboard.insight_5: Timesheet fraud pattern detected — 14 employees in Sales with identical overtime hours
dashboard.insight_6: Compliance check passed for Acme Corp Q2 filing — all documents verified

employees.pageDescription: Employee directory with risk scores, payroll history, verification status, and AI-powered anomaly detection.

companies.pageDescription: Multi-tenant company management with entity profiles, risk assessments, and compliance tracking.

compliance.pageDescription: Entity profiles with verification status, compliance indicators, AI-generated public record summaries, and sanctions screening.

auditLogs.pageDescription: Immutable activity timeline tracking user actions, AI decisions, analyst reviews, and system events.
auditLogs.activityHeatmapDesc: Event frequency over the last 12 weeks
auditLogs.patternRepeatedIpDesc: Multiple document uploads detected from the same IP address in a short time window. Possible automated scraping.
auditLogs.patternPayrollAnomaliesDesc: Multiple payroll files show overtime inconsistencies in the same department. Cross-reference recommended.
auditLogs.patternUnusualFrequencyDesc: Upload activity peaked significantly above the daily average during off-hours. Possible data extraction.
auditLogs.emptyTimelineDescription: No events have been recorded yet. Timeline will populate as activities occur.
auditLogs.activityHeatmapEmpty: Activity data will appear here over time.
auditLogs.emptyPatternsDescription: No suspicious patterns detected yet. Patterns will appear as the system processes data.

reports.pageDescription: Awaiting data. Reports will populate once documents are analyzed by the AI system.
reports.aiInsightText: AI insights will be generated automatically as documents are analyzed. Insights with risk assessments, anomaly summaries, and recommended actions will appear here.
reports.noDataAvailable: No data available yet. Reports will populate as documents are analyzed.

assistant.greeting: Hello! I'm your PaySentinel IQ AI assistant. I can help you analyze payroll data, investigate fraud alerts, and generate insights. Ask me anything!
assistant.inputPlaceholder: Ask me about payroll, fraud alerts, or verification...

analysis.title: Document Analysis
analysis.description: AI-powered document fraud detection and verification
analysis.uploadDescription: Drag and drop PDF, PNG, or JPG files. Maximum 3 documents.
analysis.extraInfoDescription: Provide extra information to assist the AI analysis

payroll.title: Payroll
payroll.description: AI-powered payroll fraud detection and verification
payroll.heroDescription: Our multi-agent AI system analyzes payroll documents through 7 verification layers — OCR extraction, metadata validation, financial consistency checks, fraud pattern detection, and risk scoring — all powered by specialized AI agents!
payroll.extraHint: Provide extra context to help our AI agents detect salary discrepancies, ghost employees, and financial fraud patterns more accurately.

bankSlip.title: Bank Slip
bankSlip.description: AI-powered bank slip and boleto fraud detection
bankSlip.heroDescription: Our AI agents validate boleto authenticity through barcode decoding, FEBRABAN compliance checks, PIX fraud detection, issuer verification against Central Bank records, forgery artifact scanning, and payment destination validation.
bankSlip.extraHint: Additional information helps our AI identify forged boletos, PIX fraud, and payment inconsistencies with higher precision.
